Appearances:
Plaintiff KAHTAN ALANSI not present.
Attorney AARON FARMER for the plaintiff.
Defendant MARIA DEL SOCORRO PACHECO is present.
Attorney PAULINE FARMER-KOPPENOL appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem MARK SCHREIBER, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501-A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB-10-2014 remains on calendar.
